case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. VERONICA MARRERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 64838473) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 66482258) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MARRERO, VERONICA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-17-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARRERO, VERONICA $3,267.49 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,526.44, SEE SCANNED DOC
